# anthropic_invites (Data Source)

Lists all Anthropic invites in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_invites" "all" {}

output "pending_invites" {
  value = [for i in data.anthropic_invites.all.invites : i.email if i.status == "pending"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `invites` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--invites))

<a id="nestedatt--invites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `invites`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `invited_at` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `status` (String)
